# MERN Stack Project Instructions

## Project Structure
- **Backend**: Node.js with Express and MongoDB
- **Frontend**: React with Vite and Tailwind CSS
- **Database**: MongoDB connection setup
- **Environment**: Separate .env files for backend and frontend

## Development Guidelines
- Use latest JavaScript features (ES6+, async/await)
- Follow REST API conventions
- Use proper error handling
- Implement clean code practices
- Separate concerns (routes, controllers, models)

## Tasks Completed
- [x] Project folder structure created
- [x] Backend setup with MongoDB connection
- [x] Frontend setup with React Vite and Tailwind
- [x] Environment configuration files
- [x] Basic homepage component
- [x] Dependencies installed
- [x] Both servers running successfully

## Current Status
- ✅ Backend Server: http://localhost:5000
- ✅ Frontend Server: http://localhost:3001
- ⚠️  MongoDB: Connection ready (requires local MongoDB or MongoDB Atlas)

## Next Steps
- Set up MongoDB database (local or MongoDB Atlas)
- Update MONGODB_URI in backend/.env
- Test database connection
- Build additional API endpoints
- Add authentication and user management
